title: Spicy Sous Vide Chicken Wrap
description: A quick and easy meal made with sous vide chicken, crispy casabe, and a tangy buttermilk sauce.
instructions: Preheat the sous vide machine to 130°F.
Season the chicken breast with cumin, chili powder, salt, and pepper.
Place the chicken in the sous vide machine and cook for 2-3 hours.
While the chicken is cooking, grill the casabe pieces until crispy.
In a bowl, whisk together the buttermilk and a pinch of salt.
Once the chicken is cooked, remove it from the sous vide machine and brush with the buttermilk sauce.
Warm the tortilla by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the chicken on the tortilla, followed by the grilled casabe and a drizzle of avocado oil.
